title: IMARIS Analyses of LAMP_CATD in vitro
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4von8","text":"This protocol details how to analyse in-vitro LAMP and cathepsin D staining using Imaris software.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"88vpj","text":"Select your image files folders. Drag the .LIF files into the Imaris Arena.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8q382","text":"Double click. Do not open \\LNG files","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add new surface. Leave Creation Parameters as default Selected segment only ROI. Click next. Drag the yellow box to select the cell. Whole cell of interest. Click Next. Select the channel (for your marker of interest). Smooth Surface detail. 0.0360. Machine learning segmentation. Click Next. Draw thresholds; foreground and background w Shift-Click > 3 planes. Ensure the “pointer selection mode” is selected. Click Next. twice. Threshold to have only one mask included. Click Finish. Go to Statistics, detailed tab, average values, save/export data. o Save with suffix Cell #_MAP2

Add new surface. Add LAMP1 parameters. Ensure Select only a ROI is ticked. Ensure object-object stats is checked. Click Next. Drag yellow box to the ROI. Click Next. Select green (LAMP1) channel. Smooth 0.0361. Machine learning selected. Click Next. Add Machine Learning Thresholds. Foreground (green) and background (purple) w Shift-Click > 3 planes. Click Next. Check enable. Seed Point Diameter 0.181. Click Next. Adjust slide bar to highlight LAMP1 included regions. Click Next. Click Next. again and adjust. Click Finish. Remove LAMP1 regions by selecting the pencil (edit) and click the regions outside the cell and‘ delete’ . Move through all the planes (z-axis). Click Statistics, detailed tab; Average Values and export data. o Save with suffix Cell #_LAMP1

Create new ‘Spots’ for Cathepsin. Check the ‘different spot size (region growing). Click next. Select ROI using the yellow box. Click Next. Select the correct channel (red). Model XYZ diameter= 0.291, Estimated z diameter = 0.830. Checkbackground subtraction. Click Next. . Select threshold slider of Cat+ spots. For simplicity, select slice rendering for 3D spots. Click Next. Check absolute intensity. Click Next. Click Finish. Remove Cathepsin dots outside the cell by selecting the pencil (edit) and click the regions outside the cell and ‘delete’. Move through all the planes (z-axis). Click Statistics, detailed tab ; Average Values and export data. o Save with suffix Cell #_CatD

Select filer. Add Shortest distance to LAMP1 surface #. Slide scale bar to remove spots that aren’t touching. Click duplicate selection. Click Statistics, detailed tab; Average Values and export data. o Save with suffix Cell #_CatD_co
creator: courtney.wright Wright
